completed_work: Phase 2 planning complete: 4 plans in 3 waves. Multi-role review (security, architecture, code quality) found 2 CRITICAL + 4 HIGH + 5 MEDIUM + 2 LOW. All 7 P0/P1 fixes applied to plans. Test suite expanded from 11 to 23 cases covering escalation triggers, source field override, path traversal, malformed YAML, empty registry edge case, and specific CommandError assertions.
review_fixes_applied: P0-1: feat_id regex validation + path containment check in run_skill
P0-2: Shell injection fix — validate_input.sh uses sys.argv instead of string interpolation
P0-3: Removed registry write from Executor prompt — runtime is sole owner
P1-5: evidence_ref → evidence_refs typo fix in handler dispatch
P1-6: JSON injection fix — run.sh uses Python to construct JSON safely
P1-7: Runtime sets source.actor/session programmatically, does not trust AI values
P1-8: Escalation trigger checks before auto-registration (first-patch, semantic, test_impact, duplicate ID)
context_notes: Phase 2 plans have been reviewed by 3 roles (security, architecture, code quality) and all critical/high fixes applied. Test suite expanded to 23 cases. Plans are ready for execution. Remaining MEDIUM issues from review (Executor prompt size, dual validation paths, test directory placement) are advisory and can be addressed during or after execution.
